message:
fix(node): lane starvation false-positive on new lanes, fleet quarantine formatting, and lint tooling updates

runtime/lane_scheduler: check_starvation no longer fires for lanes that
have never completed a task (last_completion_ms == None). Previously
unwrap_or(0) treated never-completed lanes as if their last completion
was at epoch 0, making every new lane with queued items appear starved
immediately. Now only lanes with at least one completed task can trigger
starvation alerts. Test updated and split: no_starvation_when_queued_but
_never_completed validates the fix; new test starvation_detected_after_
completion_and_window_elapsed covers the legitimate case.

api/fleet_quarantine: minor formatting adjustments.
verifier_economy/mod: minor assertion tightening.
tools/lints/cx_first_policy: formatting and minor improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
